transcript: Thank you very much for watching, and I'll see you in the next video. We'll be right back. Otto, you attempted the Guinness World Records title for the longest human tunnel traveled through by a dog on a skateboard. The minimum to beat was 30 people. Congratulations, you're now a Guinness World Records title holder! Let's go, Vegas!
